classification.reason: Live expanded-MM was halted by the operator harness before posting live quotes because the prelive dry-run gate incorrectly required full theoretical count. Block I p1 had expected 18 would-submit rows, actual 14 healthy rows, two benign reference-line-mismatch total skips (contest 29 total and contest 31 total), and zero bad events. Correct behavior would have been GO_WITH_CAVEATS for healthy targets; no late recovery will be rushed.
